_source: Intro to AI Agents sales page
course_goal: Convert "Beginner" traffic (cold or warm from email) into Course Buyers.
hero_headline: Stop Chatting with AI. Start Building with It.
hero_subheadline: Most people use ChatGPT like a smarter Google. Learn the simple "Agentic" workflows that turn you into a software builder overnight—no coding required.
hero_visual_caption: Split screen video. Left: Someone typing furiously into ChatGPT. Right: Someone sipping coffee while an Agent automatically writes code, sends emails, and updates a spreadsheet.
trust_bar_text: Join 1,500+ non-technical founders, freelancers, and creators who are building their own tools.
problem_headline: Does it feel like everyone else is miles ahead of you?
problem_body:
You see the posts on X and LinkedIn. People building entire apps in minutes. Automating their whole business. Creating "agents" that do the work for them.

Meanwhile, you're still just... typing prompts.

You ask a question. You get an answer. It's cool, but it's not life-changing.

Here is the hard truth:
If you are only using AI to chat, you are leaving 90% of its power on the table. You aren't "using AI"—you're just browsing a smarter internet.

The gap between you and the "tech wizards" isn't intelligence. And it's definitely not coding skills.

It's simply that they know how to use Agents.
solution_headline: Don't Learn to Code. Learn to Manage.
solution_body:
Think of ChatGPT like an Encyclopedia. It knows everything, but it sits on the shelf until you open it.

Think of an AI Agent like a smart Intern.

You don't "chat" with an intern. You give them a job.

  • "Research these 5 competitors and write a summary."
  • "Monitor my email and draft replies to leads."
  • "Build a landing page based on this document."

And then? They go do it.

This course isn't about learning Python or JavaScript. It's about learning how to hire, train, and manage your new digital workforce.

transformation_items.title: The Research Agent
transformation_items.description: Build a bot that scours the web and compiles briefings for you while you sleep.

transformation_items.title: The Content Agent
transformation_items.description: A workflow that takes one idea and turns it into a blog post, 5 tweets, and a LinkedIn article automatically.

transformation_items.title: The Coding Agent
transformation_items.description: Yes, you will build software. You will command an agent to write code, fix errors, and deploy a simple app.

curriculum_modules.title: The No-Code Stack

curriculum_modules.title: Advanced Workflows
curriculum_modules.description: Connecting agents to the real world (Email, Slack, Web).

curriculum_modules.title: The Builder's Career
curriculum_modules.description: How to sell these skills to clients.

faq_items.question: Do I need to know how to code?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely not. If you can write a clear email, you can build an agent. We use natural language to control everything.

faq_items.question: Is this just prompt engineering?
faq_items.answer: No. Prompt engineering is about getting better text. Agent engineering is about getting better actions.

faq_items.question: What tools do I need?
faq_items.answer: We use standard, mostly free tools. We'll show you exactly what to sign up for.

offer_headline: Future-Proof Your Career for Less Than the Cost of a Dinner

offer_includes.item_text: Access to the Private Builder Community

offer_guarantee_text: If you don't build a working agent within 30 days, we'll refund every penny. No questions asked.
